user_story: As a Reporting manager, I want to assign a monthly quadrant rating to each of my employees, so that I can classify their skills and attitude
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Quadrant Rating screen; When I select a quadrant from Key Members to Bad Performers for an employee for a given month; Then the rating is saved against that employee and month

user_story: As a Reporting manager, I want to add comments to a quadrant rating, so that I can explain the rating rationale
acceptance_criteria: Given I am rating an employee; When I enter a comment; Then the comment is saved alongside the quadrant rating

user_story: As a Reporting manager, I want to view quadrant ratings across months for my employees, so that I can track performance trends over time
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Quadrant Rating screen; When my employees have ratings; Then I can see each employee's ratings by month with comments
